<!-- Generated by an 8-agent UI/UX audit (Notes, Weather, Create/Detail, Shell/Account, Design System, Accessibility, Motion, Web research) + synthesis, 2026-06-15. -->

# FishingNotes ŌĆö UI/UX Improvement Roadmap

> Status (2026-06-15): batch 1 shipped ŌĆö catch photo-journal cards, weather hero gradient, empty-state CTAs, de-greyed date pill. Remaining items tracked below.

## 1. Executive Summary

FishingNotes has a solid, recently-modernized foundation (FishingTheme tokens, bespoke animated bottom bar, white elevated cards), but five themes dominate the gap to a best-in-class 2025/2026 fishing journal. **First, the app's richest content is invisible:** every catch carries `downloadPhotoLinks` (already passed into `CatchItemContent` as `photoUrl` at `NotesViews.kt:160` then silently dropped ŌĆö the composable signature `NotesViews.kt:169-179` only keeps `photoCount`), yet lists and detail screens show text and a photo *count icon* instead of the actual photo. **Second, the app reads as a generic weather widget, not an angler tool:** no pressure-trend direction, no bite/solunar framing, no wind in the hero, and the pressure chart line is visually flat because `WeatherTrendChart` (`WeatherTrendChart.kt:54-68`) sets no Y-range. **Third, the design system is a half-built facade:** `FishingTheme.spacing/elevation/iconSize/emphasis` are used by **zero** files, Material3 Expressive is enabled but fed stock M3 tokens, and `tertiaryContainer`/`surfaceTint` are never defined. **Fourth, there is no delight layer at all:** zero haptics, zero `animateItem`, zero shared-element transitions, and saving a catch ŌĆö the app's most rewarding action ŌĆö gets a toast followed by an ad. **Fifth, accessibility is structurally broken** on the custom bottom bar (no `Role.Tab`/labels) and content photos (`contentDescription = null`). The roadmap below prioritizes the photo-journal transformation, the angler-grade weather, and the delight/a11y baseline.

## 2. Quick Wins (high impact / SŌĆōM effort)

| Improvement | Why it matters | Files | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| Render the catch photo as a leading thumbnail on list cards | The URL is already loaded and discarded (`photoUrl` dropped from `CatchItemContent` signature); turns a text list into a scannable journal ŌĆö the single biggest visual win | `ui/home/notes/NotesViews.kt:160-271` (add `photoUrl` param + `SubcomposeAsyncImage`); pattern in `ui/home/views/PhotoViews.kt:99` | M |
| Add Y-range to the pressure/temperature trend chart | Pressure (~745ŌĆō765 mmHg) plots near-flat because Vico anchors to 0; the `getBounds()` helper already exists but is dead code (`WeatherUtils.kt:57`) | `ui/home/views/WeatherTrendChart.kt:54-68`; `WeatherUtils.kt:57` | S |
| Add Wind (speed + direction arrow) to the weather hero grid | Wind is critical for fishing; data is in `Hourly.windSpeed/windDeg` and the 2-col grid cleanly becomes 2├Ś2 | `ui/home/weather/WeatherScreen.kt:293-318` | S |
| Replace flat hero `Surface(color = primary)` with `BrandGradients.primaryDiagonal` | The most prominent surface ignores the brand gradient used by the FAB; fixed `350.dp` height risks clipping | `ui/home/weather/WeatherScreen.kt:266-271`; `ui/theme/Color.kt:298` | S |
| Disable Save when invalid + inline `supportingText` | `skipAvailable` is computed but Save stays enabled and only fires a snackbar on tap (`NewCatchScreen.kt:353-362`); `BottomActionBar` already supports `enabled` | `ui/home/new_catch/NewCatchScreen.kt:353`; `ui/components/AutoSuggestTextField.kt` | S |
| Wire empty-state CTAs (`onAddCatch`/`onAddPlace` already defined but passed `null`) | New users see a grey icon with no action; the `EmptyState` action slot exists | `ui/home/notes/UserCatchesScreen.kt:38,57`; `UserPlacesScreen.kt:39,55`; `StateViews.kt:83` | S |
| Replace the deprecated muddy-green `cardColor` date pill | `NotesViews.kt:29` imports `@Deprecated cardColor=Color(0xFF8FA590)` for `ItemDate` ŌĆö the one place the old palette leaks into the blue theme | `ui/home/notes/NotesViews.kt:29,119-128` | S |
| Move marker badge `Color(0xFFFF6D00)` and `TemperatureAccent` into theme tokens | Magic colors bypass the design-system pass | `ui/home/map/MapScreen.kt:453`; `ui/home/map/PlaceDetailsCardContent.kt:50` | S |
| Add `heading()` semantics + non-null photo `contentDescription` | TalkBack can't navigate by heading anywhere (zero usage), and catch photos are silent (`null` at `PhotoViews.kt:104,315,375`) | `PhotoViews.kt`; `AppCard.kt:84`; `SettingsComponents.kt:63` | S |
| Add `Role.Tab` + labels to the custom bottom bar | Unselected tabs have no placed label and `null` icon description ŌĆö TalkBack announces anonymous controls | `ui/home/Home.kt:99-131,209-229` | M |

## 3. Themed Sections

### Lists & Content (Notes / Catches / Places)
- **Leading photo thumbnail** is the headline change (see Quick Wins). Keep `photoCount` only as a `+N` overlay badge on the thumbnail corner; fall back to a tinted `ic_fish` silhouette when no photo. (`NotesViews.kt:160-271`)
- **Add search** ŌĆö there is none anywhere in the domain (`Notes.kt:89-102` exposes only a sort icon). Add a query `StateFlow` per ViewModel + a dedicated "no results" empty state distinct from "nothing added yet". (`StateViews.kt:39`)
- **Add filter chips** under the tabs (species from `catchesBySpecies`, "Has photo", "This season"; Places: "Has catches"). Deep-link a tapped Statistics species bar into the pre-filtered Catches tab. (`Notes.kt` ~line 135; `StatisticsScreen.kt:148`)
- **Swipe actions** ŌĆö zero `SwipeToDismiss` usage. Wrap items in `SwipeToDismissBox` (trailing = delete w/ undo snackbar, leading = edit / open-on-map). Implement once in `PagedListScaffold.kt:93` so both lists inherit it.
- **Coarser date grouping** ŌĆö `toDateTextMonth()` is per-day (`TimeUtils.kt:73`), producing a sticky header above nearly every single item, and grouping only fires when time-sorted. Switch to Today/Yesterday/This week/This month/Month-Year buckets with per-section roll-ups ("3 catches ┬Ę 5.4 kg"). (`UserCatchesScreen.kt:46-58`)
- **Surface the active sort** ŌĆö the sort icon is hidden during scroll (`Notes.kt:93` gated on `!isScrollInProgress`) and shows no current state. Replace with a labeled chip ("Newest" / "Heaviest") placed under the tab row, always visible.
- **Information hierarchy** ŌĆö `fishType` and `fishWeight` share the same `AppTextStyle.Title` weight (`NotesViews.kt:200,210`); weight (the angler's headline number) should be a prominent right-aligned metric, "Amount" a quiet inline label not its own full-width line (`NotesViews.kt:214-223`), with a trophy accent when the catch matches `stats.heaviestCatch`.
- **Remove the dead `childModifier` plumbing** threaded through every item (`NotesViews.kt:39-160`) now that dedicated `CatchItemSkeleton`/`PlaceItemSkeleton` (`NotesViews.kt:272-424`) drive skeletons; replace hardcoded `12.dp`/`4.dp` with `Spacing` tokens.

### Weather (the biggest product differentiator)
- **Pressure-trend indicator** ŌĆö the #1 angling signal is absent. Compute delta between `hourly[0]` and `hourly[3]` in a pure `WeatherUtils.pressureTrend()` and show an arrow + "ŌłÆ3 mmHg / 3h ┬Ę Falling" on the hero. (`WeatherScreen.kt:295`)
- **Bite forecast / conditions score** ŌĆö all inputs already exist (pressure trend, `windSpeed`, `clouds` (currently unused in UI), precipitation probability, `moonPhase`, sunrise/sunset). Add a top "Bite forecast" card with a Poor/Fair/Good/Excellent score from a transparent weighted heuristic, listing the top 1ŌĆō2 contributing factors. (`WeatherScreen.kt` MainWeatherScreen)
- **Fix the flat chart Y-range** and **add point markers + tap-to-read** values; both axes need units (`ChartCard.kt:91` has none). (`WeatherTrendChart.kt`)
- **Add wind to the hero**, **show today's sunrise/sunset + moon glyph** on the main screen (currently buried in `WeatherDailyScreen` via `WeatherViews.kt:188-329`), and **map moon phase to a named phase** instead of a meaningless "50%" (`WeatherViews.kt:324`).
- **Daily rows discard High/Low** ŌĆö only `temperature.day` is shown (`WeatherScreen.kt:245`) though `Temperature.min/max` are populated. Show a High/Low pair and a consistent precipitation column (it currently appears/disappears at the 20% threshold, causing list jitter).
- **Surface or remove half-wired data**: `feels_like` exists with a string but is never displayed; `clouds` is fetched but never shown; `getWindSpeed` (1-decimal) is dead while the UI uses the int variant. Decide explicitly per field.
- **Fix the back button** ŌĆö the weather top-bar back arrow navigates to the Map instead of popping (`WeatherScreen.kt:112-119`); use normal up-nav and add an "Add new place" row to the picker sheet.

### Create / Detail Flows
- **Hero photo header** on Catch & Place detail ŌĆö currently the first thing shown is a small `ic_fish` icon (`Catch.kt:256`), and photos sit in a 150dp `LazyRow` (`PhotoViews.kt:182`). Add a full-bleed 220ŌĆō280dp top image with a scrim gradient and species/weight/date overlaid, collapsing on scroll; tap opens the existing `FullScreenPhoto` pager.
- **Inline map preview** ŌĆö `UserMapMarker.latitude/longitude` exist but neither detail screen shows a map. Add a rounded static-map thumbnail (Coil is already a dep; keep `expect/actual` for iOS) with a colored pin from `place.markerColor`.
- **Validation feedback** ŌĆö disable Save (Quick Wins) and migrate the raw `OutlinedTextField` weather inputs off side-effect validation (`onError(this)` smuggled into `isError`, `NewCatchWeather.kt:178,211`) onto `FormTextField` with `supportingText` and ViewModel-derived error state.
- **Auto-suggest for gear** ŌĆö fish species has history (`NewCatchSections.kt:116`) but rod/bait/lure are plain fields with no memory; reuse `AutoSuggestTextField` backed by prior-catch history.
- **Multiline notes** ŌĆö `LabeledValueRow` ellipsizes to one line (`LabeledValueRow.kt:50`), silently truncating the note's `description` (`DefaultViews.kt:46`); add a `maxLines` param + "Show more".
- **Lighten destructive delete** ŌĆö both delete dialogs render a 150dp Lottie warning then delete + popBackStack immediately with no recovery; switch catches to optimistic delete + Undo snackbar (`SnackbarAction` already used at `NewCatchScreen.kt:115`).
- **Drop the `BottomSheetScaffold` in Place detail** whose entire `sheetContent` is just `BannerAdvertView` (`Place.kt:94-107`); use `bottomBar = { BannerAdvertView() }` like `Catch.kt:127`.
- **Unify section vocabulary** ŌĆö `ExpandableSection` (surfaceContainerLow, 20dp, pill title) and detail `SectionCard` (white, `shapes.large`, raised, icon+pencil) render the same concept differently so create and detail feel like two apps.

### Design System & Typography
- **Resolve the facade** ŌĆö `FishingTheme.spacing/elevation/iconSize/emphasis` are used by **zero** files (verified); every component imports the global objects directly. Pick one pattern and add a CI grep guard. Also expose `FishingTheme.motion`/`shapeTokens`.
- **Deliver Expressive personality** ŌĆö `MaterialExpressiveTheme` is enabled (`androidMain/Theme.kt:68`) but fed the stock M3 `Shape`/`Type`/`Motion`; iOS uses plain `MaterialTheme`, so the two platforms aren't even on the same motion model. Adopt `MotionScheme.expressive()` springs as the single source of truth and delete the hand-rolled `Motion.kt` beziers.
- **Typographic weight contrast** ŌĆö Nunito ships 4 weights but the scale collapses to SemiBold/Medium; components compensate with local `fontWeight = Bold` overrides (`StatTile.kt:59`, `ChartCard.kt:44`). Re-tune `display*` to Bold/ExtraBold for hero numbers, add an `AppTextStyle.Metric`, and delete the scattered overrides.
- **Complete the color schemes** ŌĆö `tertiaryContainer`/`onTertiaryContainer`, `background`, `surfaceTint`, `scrim` are never set (verified empty grep in `Color.kt`). `InlineBannerCard.kt:42` reads `tertiaryContainer` ŌåÆ un-tuned M3 fallback; unset `surfaceTint` defaults to primary, so white `AppCard`s get a faint blue tonal tint at elevation. Set `surfaceTint = Transparent` and add domain semantic roles (success/catch, warning, water).
- **Fix elevation strategy** ŌĆö `AppCard.kt:39` uses tonal `cardElevation` (which tints), while `BrandFab`/bottom bar correctly use `shadowElevation` only ŌĆö mixed model fighting the white-card look.
- **Fill component gaps** ŌĆö no shared `AppListItem`, `AppDivider`, unified `AppChip`, or generalized badge; list rows are hand-rolled and duplicated. Extract `AppListItem` (+ skeleton) and refactor `ItemUserPlace`/`CatchItemContent` onto it.
- **Migrate ~453 raw `.dp` literals** in high-traffic components (`NotesViews.kt`, `FloatingActionButtons.kt` which even shadows the theme's `FabSize`) to tokens; add the `12`/`16` values the code keeps reinventing.

### Motion & Delight
- **Haptics** ŌĆö verified **zero** usage. Add a KMP-safe `AppHaptics` and wire a restrained vocabulary into design-system primitives: SegmentTick on tab change/stepper, LongPress on FAB speed-dial/destructive confirm, a success buzz on `NewCatchViewState.Complete`. (`Home.kt:126`, `BrandFab.kt:45`, `FloatingActionButtons.kt:52`)
- **List animations** ŌĆö verified **zero** `animateItem`; `PagedListScaffold` uses positional keys (`item(key = "item_$index")`, `PagedListScaffold.kt:93`). Add a `stableKey: (T)->Any` param (use `id`) and `Modifier.animateItem()` so sort/insert/delete animate.
- **Catch-saved celebration** ŌĆö the most rewarding action gets `showMessage()` + `launchAd()` (`NewCatchScreen.kt:104-108`). Add a ~900ms branded Lottie splash/checkmark (compottie already a dep) + success haptic, skippable on tap.
- **Press-scale + branded snackbar + animated empty states** ŌĆö `BrandFab` is ripple-only; the stock M3 snackbar is the app's main feedback surface; empty/error states render instantly with no entrance (`slideUpFadeIn` exists at `AppNavTransitions.kt:41` but is unused).
- **Token sweep** ŌĆö 11 files use raw `tween(300/200/250/ŌĆ”)`; route through `Motion.*` and add a CI check flagging new `tween(<number>)`.
- **Shared-element zoom** (phased) ŌĆö verified **zero** `sharedElement`; thumbnailŌåÆfullscreen and list-cardŌåÆdetail are strong candidates.

### Accessibility
- **Bottom bar** (Quick Wins): `Role.Tab` + explicit name regardless of animation; wrap in `selectableGroup()`. Don't rely on the alpha-animated label as the accessible name. (`Home.kt:209-229,273-293`)
- **Content photos** non-null `contentDescription` (`PhotoViews.kt:104,315,375`).
- **Merge card semantics** ŌĆö clickable `AppCard` doesn't merge descendants, so TalkBack surfaces stray inner nodes (the location icon's "location") plus a long concatenation; add `accessibleCard()` to `AppCard(onClick)` by construction.
- **Settings toggles** produce double focus targets with no state ŌĆö use `Modifier.toggleable(role = Role.Switch)` and make the embedded `Switch` decorative (`SettingsComponents.kt:127-149,179-213`).
- **Chart summary** ŌĆö Vico charts expose nothing; add a `contentDescription` trend summary built from `points`.
- **Touch targets & contrast** ŌĆö `FirstSpotPromptCard` close is 32dp (`:107-116`), color swatches 40dp (`SettingsComponents.kt:244`); no `minimumInteractiveComponentSize()` anywhere. `WeatherMetric` label at 0.60 alpha onPrimary over blue (`WeatherContent.kt:47`) and white-at-0.7 icons risk failing 4.5:1.
- **Add a reusable a11y helper** (`accessibleCard`, `decorative`, `minTouchTarget`) since semantics exist in only ~6 files today.

### First-Run & Retention
- **Profile is data-rich, presentationally thin** ŌĆö only 2 StatTiles + Favorite Place + Best Catch, while the model has fishType/fishWeight/fishAmount/date/weather per catch (`UserCatch.kt:14-31`). Add an angler-identity hero: personal-best weight+species, total fish landed (sum of `fishAmount`), "fishing since" streak, a top-3 species row, and an Achievements/badges row (First Catch, 10 Catches, Four Seasons). Add bottom contentPadding so the last card clears the bespoke bottom bar (currently none). (`Profile.kt:62-138`)
- **Consolidate account management** ŌĆö logout is a bare door icon in the Profile top bar (`ProfileViews.kt:51`); Settings has no Account group and there is **no delete-account flow** (a Play Store requirement). Add an Account `SettingsGroup` with identity, logout, and destructive delete. Add Privacy/Terms/Licenses/Support to `AboutApp` (`AboutApp.kt:64`).
- **Map discoverability** ŌĆö the FAB long-press quick-add (`MapScreen.kt:539`) has zero on-screen affordance and is gated behind a setting; there is no place/address search or jump-to-saved-spot. Add a visible "Add here" speed-dial action and a top-center search pill.
- **Onboarding ŌåÆ first action continuity** ŌĆö 3 generic Lottie slides drop the user onto the Map; make the final slide "Add your first spot" route directly into place-selection so `FirstSpotPromptCard` is the literal next step. Pull onboarding's hardcoded gradients (`OnboardingScreen.kt:69-84`) from brand tokens.

## 4. Phased Plan

### P0 ŌĆö Now (transform the core experience)
- Catch list **photo thumbnails** (`NotesViews.kt` ŌĆö restore the dropped `photoUrl`).
- Weather **pressure-trend indicator** + **fix chart Y-range** + **wind in hero** + **gradient hero**.
- New Catch **Save validation** (disable + inline errors) and **empty-state CTAs**.
- **Haptics** baseline in design-system primitives.
- A11y **must-fixes**: bottom-bar `Role.Tab`, non-null photo descriptions, `heading()` semantics.
- Retire the deprecated `cardColor` date pill + magic marker/temperature colors.

### P1 ŌĆö Next (depth & delight)
- **Search + filter chips + swipe-to-delete-with-undo**; coarser date buckets; surfaced sort chip.
- **Bite forecast / conditions score** + today's sunrise/sunset/moon on the main weather screen; High/Low daily rows.
- **Hero photo header** + **inline map preview** on detail; multiline notes; lighter delete + undo.
- **Statistics insight banner** (`averageWeight`/`mostCaughtSpecies`/`weightBySpecies` are computed but never shown) + chart-type variety.
- **Profile angler-identity hero** + achievements; **Account settings group** + delete-account flow.
- **List `animateItem` + stable keys**; **catch-saved celebration**; branded snackbar; press-scale.
- Resolve the **FishingTheme facade**; complete **color schemes** (`tertiaryContainer`/`surfaceTint`); typography weight contrast.

### P2 ŌĆö Later (polish & signature)
- Full **Material3 Expressive** adoption: spring `MotionScheme`, shape-morph FAB/indicator, FAB Menu, new Loading Indicator; align iOS theme.
- **Shared-element zoom** (thumbnailŌåÆfullscreen, cardŌåÆdetail).
- **AppListItem/AppDivider/AppChip** extraction; raw-`.dp` and raw-`tween` CI budgets.
- Auto-suggest gear history; unify `ExpandableSection`/`SectionCard`; static empty-state illustrations.
- Map search/jump-to-spot; onboardingŌåÆfirst-action continuity; chart interactivity + a11y summaries.

## 5. Signature Moments (distinctive brand touches)

1. **The Catch Card as a journal entry, not a row.** A leading hero thumbnail with a `+N` overlay, a prominent right-aligned weight metric, and a gold trophy accent when a catch is the heaviest of its species (`stats.heaviestCatch`). This is the difference between "list app" and "trophy log" ŌĆö and the photo data is already loaded, just discarded today.
2. **The Bite Window.** Turn the weather hero from a meteorology widget into an angler tool: a falling-pressure arrow ("ŌłÆ4 mmHg ┬Ę feeding window"), a PoorŌåÆExcellent bite score with named contributing factors, and falling-pressure regions shaded on the trend chart ŌĆö all derivable from data already fetched (`Hourly.pressure`, `clouds`, `moonPhase`, sunrise/sunset). No competitor's stock weather tab does this.
3. **The Catch-Saved splash.** A ~900ms branded compottie moment (fish splash / hook-set in brand blue-green) with a success haptic when a catch is saved ŌĆö replacing the current toast-then-ad. The single highest-ROI delight beat in the app.
4. **The Trophy-Case Profile.** A Strava-style identity hero: personal-best species + weight, total fish landed, a catches-per-month sparkline (reuse the Vico infra), and an unlockable badge shelf (Four Seasons, 10 Catches, 5 Spots) ŌĆö turning a settings-like page into a reason to return.
5. **Organic shape language via M3 Expressive shape-morph.** A FAB that morphs between a rounded-square rest and a scalloped pressed state, plus a subtly organic selected bottom-bar indicator ŌĆö the cheapest way to make the app stop reading as stock Material while preserving the loved width-animated bottom bar.
